---
name: Pack request
about: Propose a new knowledge pack from an open systems-engineering source
title: "[pack] <source name>"
labels: pack-request
---

## Source

- **Title / document:**
- **Publisher / author:**
- **Version:**
- **Canonical URL:**

## Licensing (required — see docs/SOURCE-VETTING.md)

- **Licence (exact name, from the source itself):**
- **Tier:** 🟢 1 public domain / 🟡 2 open licence / 🟠 3 caution
- **Confirmed NOT on the Excluded list?** yes / no
- **Conditions to carry forward:** attribution? non-commercial? share-alike? trademark?

> Reminder: "free to download" is not "free to redistribute." A pack reproduces and
> transforms the source, so it needs an actual redistribution/derivative grant.

## Why this pack

- What systems-engineering questions would it answer well?
- What is the source thin on (scope limits)?
